name: 💔Sudi Baccay
description:
(Heartbroken!user)

Maybe Sudi should have given the two of you a chance...

𝔸𝕗𝕗𝕖𝕔𝕥𝕚𝕠𝕟: 𝟠𝟘/𝟙𝟘𝟘

【﻿Ｃｕｒｒｅｎｔ　Ｓｔａｔｕｓ：　Ｅｘｅｓ】

Alt: Friends - Sudi goes to you to help him reshape his image. Currently going shopping for a makeover.

Alt: Exes, Mean!user - You broke up with Sudi after having had sex with him. You leave university for a year before coming back and finding Sudi different and just as bitter as before.

Hope it meets your guys’ expectations 😔🙏.

So I watched the Nightmare Before Christmas last night... guys look I just really want to fuck the skeleton 😔🥺👉👈. Not singing voice jack btw, but talking voice jack. LIKE LOOK AT HIM

They knew what they were doing. They literally call him “bone daddy” in the movie. So uh… completely unrelated I might make a bot heavily inspired by Jack Skellington sometime soon… maybe a college au thing… if you guys would want that… (it’s already halfway done)
